cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: Regroup

cards.basicText:
Choose an effect:
- Summon each of your Stormtroopers to
   empty spaces in Darth Vader's zone.
- Choose an opposing fighter. That
   fighter receives 1 damage for each 
   Stormtrooper in their zone.
cards.title: 501st Legion

cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's attack value.
cards.title: Ambush

cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be cancelled.
cards.duringText: This card has -1 attack value for each card in your hand.
cards.title: The Power of the Dark Side

cards.duringText: If your opponent played a versatile card to defend, add its BOOST value to this card's attack value
cards.title: Your Thoughts Betray You

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, your opponent must discard a Scheme card. If they cannot, they must reveal their hand instead.
cards.title: Your Powers are Weak

cards.duringText: Your opponent may BOOST their defense card. If they do, draw a number of cards equal to the BOOST value.
cards.title: Release Your Anger

cards.basicText: Choose any space in Darth Vader's zone. Deal 1 damage to each opposing fighter in that space and in 1 adjacent space. You may discard 1 card to instead deal damage equal to its BOOST value.
cards.title: Wrath

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal 2 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.duringText: If the opposing fighter is not adjacent, this card's value is 6.
cards.title: Deflection

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal 10 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: All Too Easy

hero.name: DARTH VADER
hero.specialAbility: When Darth Vader would be dealt damage, you may discard any number of cards to ignore 1 damage for each card you discard. You cannot discard more cards than damage Darth Vader would receive.

name: Darth Vader
note:
V1.0 - Calling this one complete. The Power of the Dark Side's value reduced to 8, as t was too reliable of a win condition. Your Thought Betray You's effect changed to mirror Dracula's Do My Bidding, as well as profit off of a Your Powers are Weak trigger.
V1.01 - RELEASE YOUR ANGER brought up to 7 to keep in line with Sun Wukong's Ox Form.
v1.02 - Your Thoughts Betray You's effect merged, adds BOOST from opposing card if it's a versatile.
v1.03 - RELEASE YOUR ANGER reverted to 6, pulled too much focus from THE POWER OF THE DARK SIDE. YOUR THOUGHTS BETRAY YOU reduced to 3 value.
v1.04 - Wording cleanup, minor mechanical change to 501st LEGION, now summons all Stormtroopers instead of placing only defeated ones.
